title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Triveniganj

title: Flood protection works in Triveniganj inspected by state cabinet delegation

snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Triveniganj, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
